hooks.command:
printf '### OPERATING LOOP active (AGENTS.md): run the 5 pre-flight questions before acting; update WORK_LEDGER.md in the same commit.

### DEEP ONBOARDING (read BEFORE acting — SCOPED to the active node, NOT the whole docs/ tree):
  1. Read AGENTS.md fully (HOW: operating loop + manias).
  2. Open ONLY the MEMORY.md memories relevant to the active node (WHY/lessons of THAT topic).
  3. Read the FULL design doc named on the active WORK_LEDGER node (that Gate/ADR/phase).
  Depth, not breadth: do not stop at one ADR (too shallow) and do not read the whole folder (too much). The ledger below is only WHERE; context lives across 3 axes.

=== WORK_LEDGER.md (live state) ===
'; cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/WORK_LEDGER.md" 2>/dev/null || echo '(not found)'
